questions.subject: verbal
questions.subtopic_name: Angle Between the Hands of Clock
questions.body: When the minute hand covers a distance of 1h 20 min, then what is the angular distance covered by it?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.subtopic_name: Angle Between the Hands of Clock
questions.body: What is the angle traced by hour hand in15 min?

solutions.solution:
Total minute spaces = 1h + 20 min = 60 min + 20 min = 80 min
1 min space = 6°
∴ 80 min spaces = 80 × 6° = 480°

Angle traced by hour hand in 1 min = (1/2)°
∴ Angle traced by hour hand in 15 min = 15 × 1°/2 = 7.5°
